3D & Animation

PixyCAD is a native 3D CAD app for Mac and iPad, built for makers, designers and 3D-printing enthusiasts who want professional solid modelling without traditional CAD complexity. It combines an approachable modelling workflow with a professional geometry foundation powered by Parasolid. We are launching on Product Hunt to get feedback from people who care about CAD, 3D printing and better creative tools on Apple platforms.

Andrea Sartori

📌

Hi Product Hunt — I’m Andrea, from PixyCAD team We built PixyCAD because many 3D CAD tools still feel too complex for makers and 3D-printing enthusiasts, especially when working on modern Apple devices. Mac and iPad users deserve a native modelling experience that feels approachable without giving up a professional solid-modelling foundation. PixyCAD is a native CAD app for Mac and iPad, powered by Parasolid. It supports workflows from sketching to solid modelling, with Apple Pencil support on iPad and export formats including STEP, Parasolid, STL and 3MF. PixyCAD is free to try with the Starter plan, and today we are mainly looking for honest feedback. Thank you for taking a look. [...] Launch Team

results.title: PixyCAD - 3D Solid Modelling - App Store - Apple
results.content: Powerful yet approachable 3D CAD for iPad and Mac, built for fast modeling, precision, and a truly native experience. PixyCAD is 3D CAD 3D printing enthusiasts, yet simple enough for anyone to pick up and start creating. Most CAD tools are powerful but feel heavy, complex, and slow to iterate. PixyCAD focuses on the essential workflow you actually use to get from idea → solid model → 3D print, with an interface that stays out of your way so you can keep building. Built for a fast maker workflow • Lightning fast, fully on-device PixyCAD is Metal-optimized and runs entirely on your device. Rotate, pan, and edit even detailed models smoothly, without lag, logins, or cloud delays. • Lightweight, polished UI for quick iteration Every control is tuned for rapid changes and experimentation. [...] control is tuned for rapid changes and experimentation. Adjust dimensions, tweak features, and try variations without digging through deep menus. You see what matters: your model, your measurements, your print-ready geometry. • Ready for your 3D printer and other tools Import and export in the formats you actually use: STL and 3MF for slicing and printing, STEP and Parasolid X\_T for collaboration with other CAD tools or sharing with manufacturers. Work where you want Start a concept on iPad with Pencil, refine it on your Mac with a keyboard and mouse, then make final tweaks back on the couch with your iPad. PixyCAD keeps your workflow consistent across devices, so you can design wherever inspiration strikes—at your desk, in the workshop, or on the go. Designed for a gentle learning curve

results.title: PixyCAD - Powerful 3D CAD, Beautifully Simple
results.content:
# Powerful 3D CAD, Beautifully Simple

Made for makers and 3D printing enthusiasts, designed for everyone. 3D CAD for macOS and iPadOS that anyone can pick up and start creating with.

Watch Videos

Most CAD tools feel heavy, complex, and slow to iterate. PixyCAD strips away that friction so you can go from idea to solid model to 3D print -whether you're a seasoned maker or designing your very first object.

## Built for a Fast Maker Workflow

Every tool is tuned for rapid changes and experimentation. You see what matters: your model.

Apple Pencil–First on iPad

##### Apple Pencil–First on iPad

Sketch your idea with Apple Pencil, then turn it into a precise 3D model -no CAD experience needed.

Lightning Fast, Fully On-Device

##### Lightning Fast, On-Device [...] ##### Lightning Fast, On-Device

Metal-optimized and runs entirely on your device. Rotate, pan, and edit even detailed models smoothly -no lag, logins, or cloud delays.

Work Where You Want

##### Work Where You Want

Start on iPad with Apple Pencil, refine on Mac with keyboard and mouse. Your workflow stays consistent across devices.

Quick Iteration

##### Quick Iteration

Create, Adjust and Tweak. See what matters: your model and your measurements.

Gentle Learning Curve

##### Gentle Learning Curve

Your first steps in 3D design feel as natural as sketching a doodle. Tools that feel approachable on day one and stay powerful as your skills grow.

Print-Ready Formats

##### Print-Ready Formats [...] Print-Ready Formats

##### Print-Ready Formats

Export STL and 3MF for slicing and printing. STEP and Parasolid X\_T for collaboration with other CAD tools or sharing with manufacturers.

Design Faster, Design Smarter,  
Design Happily

Made for makers, designed for everyone. Download PixyCAD and start creating.

Download on the App Store

requires iPadOS 26.0+ or macOS 15.0+ with Apple Silicon

Sign up to stay updated on PixyCAD news

results.title: PixyCAD app launches for parasolid CAD on iPad
results.content:
On iPad, PixyCAD is designed around Apple Pencil. Users can sketch a profile, extrude it into 3D, and refine the model by editing faces and edges directly. On Mac, the same workflow carries over in a consistent interface built for precision and speed. Everything runs on-device, with no cloud dependency, no required login, and no risk of losing files if a subscription ends.

“PixyCAD combines robust solid modelling and professional interoperability with a more approachable direct-modelling workflow,” said PixyCAD’s Marco Pifferi. “Rather than a traditional history-based system, users work directly with geometry by sketching, extruding, editing faces and edges, and refining parts quickly for iteration and downstream use.”

###### Related articles: [...] Available for iPadOS 26 and macOS 15 on Apple Silicon. Built on Parasolid, the same professional geometry kernel used in leading CAD software, PixyCAD says it gives makers, 3D printing enthusiasts and hobbyists access to serious modeling tools in a workflow that feels approachable from the start.

The free Starter tier offers all core modelling tools plus STL and 3MF export. The Maker tier, priced at $19.99 per month or $179.99 per year, unlocks unlimited projects, high-resolution export, and support for professional formats including STEP and Parasolid X\_T to take designs further downstream. [...] DEVELOP3D
DEVELOP3D
DEVELOP3D
PixyCAD app for 3D CAD one-time purchase

# PixyCAD app launches for parasolid CAD on iPad

PixyCAD has launched its parasolid modelling app for iPad and Mac, including a free tier available via the App Store.

Using a direct-modelling workflow, PixyCAD lets users work with geometry directly – push and pull faces, add fillets, subtract volumes, and iterate quickly without managing a complex history tree. For the kinds of parts many makers actually create, such as brackets, enclosures, adapters, mounts and replacement components, PixyCAD says this approach is often faster, more intuitive and better suited to rapid design exploration.
